text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So there's this girl who just lost a race, 
and she's here at school today…

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wonder, what sort of gesture would 
make her feel better…?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. In the language of flowers, 
chamomile symbolizes "energy in adversity",
so…

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, I think I'll make some chamomile 
tea for her. I hope it'll help cheer her up…!
